title: Certificate of Officer of Record
text: For the purposes of Section 1530, a certificate of a custodian of records in the office of the recorder of any county of this state is sufficient if it substantially states: 'I, the undersigned, the (title of office) of __________ County, State of California, do hereby certify that the foregoing is a full, true, and correct copy of the original record of __________, No. __________, on file in this office, and that I have compared the foregoing with the said original record and found the same to be a full, true, and correct copy thereof and of the whole of said original.'
